title: Filipino-Style Menudo
description: A hearty Filipino breakfast stew made with ground pork and a variety of spices. Serve with steamed rice for a filling meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the sliced menudo and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the ground pork and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the diced tomato, fish sauce, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper. Stir well.
Pour in 2 cups of water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in the lime juice and zest.
Garnish with chopped green onions and a wedge of lime, if desired.
